sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74754" key="o)rganopoie/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀργᾰνο-ποιέω</orth>, <sense id="n74754.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">furnish with organs,</tr_> c. acc., <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4017.tlg001:186:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Syrian.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Metaph.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">186.10</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
